reasoning: The community market puts this at ~4.15%. Reaching full AGI by the end of 2025 requires an incredibly fast leap from current Level 2 systems to Level 5. Furthermore, OpenAI has a strong structural disincentive to officially declare AGI, as doing so would terminate Microsoft's commercial IP license according to their contract. Most serious predictions, even by aggressive insiders, place AGI around 2027 at the earliest. Thus, the chance of an official declaration of AGI by the end of 2025 is very low, making 3.5% appropriate (adjusting slightly downward from the market to account for long-shot bias).
